title: leucas indica
intro: Leucas indica, also known as Wild Jasmine or Wild Verbena, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Leucas indica include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. Leucas indica can be prepared as an herbal tea, powder, or oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
